From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 18 Mar 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-03-18
Message-ID: <_x2ATRIVSC-Qh6y3TAqDjQ@geopod-ismtpd-35>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="c9c4eddea83b0b5d8850a087740c71f6a1a15a05cbcc2429e5a6b13a3bd3"

Hi there, Llama Lovers! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including the
launch of LlamaExtract in public beta, a step-by-step tutorial on
building agentic reasoning systems, and a collection of templates
for automating knowledge work. Dive into these highlights and
more to enhance your experience with our tools!

🤩 The Highlights:

* Step-by-Step Tutorial on Corrective RAG: Check out this
fantastic tutorial by @akshay_pachaar on building an agentic
reasoning system for search and retrieval (specifically,
corrective RAG) from scratch using @llama_index workflows. Learn
more ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XgxcIWECs8nWamHERNcXIm1LMXozByJ0Nvud8pCr3wI ).

* Task-Specific Agent Templates: We’re curating a collection of
templates that show you how to build task-specific agents to
automate knowledge work. With just a few lines of code, you can
orchestrate workflows for various tasks, including processing
slide decks and extracting invoice line items. Explore the
templates ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HP1IBSGa1uQ2zs3BQ8rU-yOA1HYd_NLT1nspznj8iTI ) and sign up for LlamaCloud
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qEzBTlxGpCzkyruld5YOA1l_VtZDSnNbbHX_R4KdkYo ).

* Model Context Protocol Integration: Connect your LlamaIndex
agents to any Model Context Protocol server! This integration
allows you to use tools exposed by any MCP-compatible server in
your LlamaIndex agent with just one line of code. Install the
integration ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uEw2vKBx0z3_ERZnTYOHQve1wRHOFsxSN5UQtbZ35oU ) and see a full demo 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..F_agy8D_9e1eqOv18P5pGky_A0OywodfEh29CWJlh0Q ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* LlamaExtract Public Beta: LlamaExtract is now in public beta!
This tool allows you to extract structured data from long,
complex documents effortlessly. Read the full post 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..EHNa-b6TB1ZsUXon7q1qXWRoQWfs2poz2SHnO2KefUw ) and sign up for LlamaExtract 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3VI8-S9On6VHSLfNBpDJ-9AheCn0pcYGTSZLsnTOAJ8 ).

✨ Framework:

* Enhanced Workflows for LlamaIndex: We’re excited to announce
updates that allow you to orchestrate complex, customizable
event-driven agent workflows using @llama_index. This enhancement
is crucial for building robust AI solutions. Check out the
introduction to workflows ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XgxcIWECs8nWamHERNcXIm1LMXozByJ0Nvud8pCr3wI ).

✍️ Community:

* AI and Web Development Insights: Join industry experts at
@WeAreDevs WebDev & AI Day on March 27 to learn about AI's role
in platform engineering and developer tools. Learn more about the
event ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..EfWmjq8CKJkGFIbv7hygB6U0GbGQ8XhD-7AXCETbZew ) and get a 15% discount on
us! Claim your discount ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..sDTB3RtBQZ7ms2m_fQ09OhuE1qmGXqvuOXHpsAaKXgM ).

* 5th LLM x Law Hackathon: Participate in the upcoming hackathon
at @stanford on April 6, where innovators will develop AI
solutions for legal work. Sign up to participate 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..LSrTv1Z_ygqmU6M2XTh4mvI57zL_eOYBidakCLSbrws ).

* Updated AnthropicAI Cookbook: We’ve expanded our @AnthropicAI
cookbook with new features, including basic API setup, streaming
support, and multi-modal capabilities. Check it out here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YXoaZ3IHGypQ2bXq501eSslsx4_5xJy8L9p5NSdxKuo ).

* Real-Time Knowledge Graph Exploration: Explore a knowledge
graph in real-time using LLMs with the impressive demo from
@yworks showcasing their SDK for visualizing knowledge
graphs. Read their blog ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qxwRit1HALg5y88ggpLbULk6R2ujNYY236KpKxodoMk ) or head to
the repo ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..J3oqNXho9dgguwIMtFuAzpszOZw04uF6lFYvmDvINLw ).

Thank you for being part of our community! Stay tuned for more
updates, and don’t hesitate to reach out with any questions or
feedback.

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tClUZZLgI9aPcG8FjfODsGMIoWh3bANYUh6LAYeT3gM )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..LEhKRvinTH3uDGAMCdHNtgC5jQ-XDe95LXfQaeOY5mw )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Y4R0jk5LYmk1ZYjGLhClztAbgY4iKa2CAKD2V268cSs )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
